scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.json && concurrently -k --names tsc,server --prefix-colors blue,green "tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "node --watch dist/server.js"
scripts.rebuild: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pkill -f 'node dist/server.js' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3 && node dist/server.js &
